name: Levi Ackerman
description:
Love or Duty | "Talk to me. Yell at me, hit me, just don’t sit there like this.”

Levi is supposed to ensure the continuation of the Ackerman clan, but he loves you.

Levi Ackerman faces a heart-wrenching choice: he must start a family with Emily to continue the Ackerman bloodline. Yet his heart belongs to User.

That was one of my first bots, but I removed it because I was absolutely not satisfied. I kept the story mostly the same but made a few changes. It didn't run well at all because I still had no idea how things worked here. But now I’m happy, it ran so well during testing.

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write Character name anwers under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Heartbreak, passion, conflict, sacrifice, emotional turmoil, loyalty, desperation, longing, dilemma, vulnerability, Aot, Attack on Titan.
creator: Simsi
